description: Explore Ahrefs SEO data from the terminal: backlinks, keywords, rank tracking, site audits, SERPs, usage limits, and crawler IP ranges.

novel_features.name: Crawler IP allowlist lookup
novel_features.description: Return Ahrefs crawler IP addresses without requiring an Ahrefs API key.

novel_features.name: Crawler CIDR range lookup
novel_features.description: Return Ahrefs crawler IP ranges without requiring an Ahrefs API key.

novel_features.name: API usage and limit check
novel_features.description: Inspect Ahrefs API subscription limits and usage through the documented v3 endpoint.

novel_features.name: Backlink profile snapshot
novel_features.description: Fetch point-in-time backlink metrics for a target from Ahrefs Site Explorer.

novel_features.name: Keyword volume by country
novel_features.description: Compare keyword search volume across countries from Ahrefs Keywords Explorer.

catalog_description: Explore Ahrefs SEO data from the terminal: backlinks, keywords, rank tracking, site audits, SERPs, usage limits, and crawler IP ranges.
